channel.title: OpenAI Developer Blog
channel.description: Updates for developers building with OpenAI

item.title: Building frontend UIs with Codex and Figma
item.description: Use Codex and Figma to bring real, running interfaces into Figma, refine them, and bring changes back to Codex.

item.title: Run long horizon tasks with Codex
Shell + Skills + Compaction: Tips for long-running agents that do real work
item.description: Practical patterns for building with skills, hosted shell, and server-side compaction in the Responses API.

item.title: 15 lessons learned building ChatGPT Apps
item.description: And how we incorporated them into a Codex Skill to help you build ChatGPT Apps 10x faster.

item.title: Testing Agent Skills Systematically with Evals
item.description: A practical guide to turning agent skills into something you can test, score, and improve over time.

item.title: Supercharging Codex with JetBrains MCP at Skyscanner
item.description: How Skyscanner integrated Codex CLI with JetBrains IDEs to speed up debugging, testing, and development workflows.

item.title: OpenAI for Developers in 2025
item.description: A year-end roundup of the biggest model, API, and platform shifts for building production-grade agents.

item.title: Updates for developers building with voice
item.description: New audio model snapshots and broader access to Custom Voices for production voice apps.

item.title: What makes a great ChatGPT app
item.description: How to build capabilities that make conversations better.

item.title: Using Codex for education at Dagster Labs
item.description: Learn how Dagster uses Codex in their open-source projects to accelerate documentation, translate content across mediums, and even measure how complete their docs are.

item.title: How Codex ran OpenAI DevDay 2025
item.description: Learn how Codex helped us build experiences, demos, products, and more

item.title: Why we built the Responses API
item.description: How the Responses API unlocks persistent reasoning, hosted tools, and multimodal workflows for GPT-5.

item.title: Developer notes on the Realtime API
item.description: Details worth noticing in recent realtime speech-to-speech updates
